description: Made of 100% polyester outer with 100% nylon lining for enhanced durability and style One main roomy zipped compartment with a padded laptop sleeve and velcro fastening Zipped pouch on the front with organiser sleeves for your mobile and essentials A small zipped compartment on the top right corner for added space Two zipped pockets on the front and two mesh pockets on the sides Brand badge applique on the front and back Haul loop at the top for ease of carrying Padded, adjustable shoulders straps with mesh lining, engineered with Sport Fit System technology to absorb shock and cushion the shoulder, distributing loads more evenly Mesh panels on the back using the sport fit system technology for improved comfort and ventilation Ergonomic design to fit along the torso comfortably Branded zips and sliders for easy use Warranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount)
